items.title: Spain strike late to book WC semifinal with France...
items.summary: In an outcome that felt inevitable for most of the game, Spain beat Belgium 2-1 with a late goal from a familiar face Friday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
